completed_tasks.name: Premium bonus library + landing redesign by octo agent
Phase 10 gaps closed: signup timezone + requireSession lastActiveAt
Phase 12 scope locked from user Q&A
Track B MVP: personas.json + playwright/sdk deps + icp-funnel-sim.ts harness + npm run qa:icp + README

remaining_tasks.name: Run harness with real ANTHROPIC_API_KEY against localhost:3000 — verify report quality before automating
Expand harness surface — signup -> curriculum -> lab -> exam (follow-up phases)
Nightly cron at 03:00 UTC (decision logged; not wired)
Track A: Vitest + Playwright + MSW + supertest deterministic suite

human_actions_pending.action: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in env, start `npm run dev` in one terminal, then `npm run qa:icp` in another
human_actions_pending.context: harness exits cleanly without the key — CI-safe

human_actions_pending.action: Review first generated report at .planning/qa-reports/YYYY-MM-DD-landing.md before deciding to automate
human_actions_pending.context: MVP shape is intentional; report quality is the gate for surface expansion + cron

decisions.decision: Phase 12 split into Track A (deterministic) + Track B (ICP simulation); Track B first
decisions.rationale: User's detailed answers made Track B the headline; Track A defers until B proves valuable

decisions.decision: Test stack with mocking: Vitest + Playwright + MSW + supertest
decisions.rationale: User chose 'with mocking' over leaner Vitest+Playwright only

decisions.decision: Sonnet 4.6 for per-step ICP vision pass; Haiku 4.5 for chain-of-critique synthesis
decisions.rationale: Vision needs Sonnet; re-reading notes is cheap, Haiku is sufficient
User explicit choice; safer for v1, humans own merge call

decisions.decision: Chain-of-critique: 3 passes (notes / re-read for missed observations / aggregate)
decisions.rationale: User chose chain over single-pass to catch second-order issues

decisions.decision: Whole-repo nightly cron (03:00 UTC), not per-PR
decisions.rationale: User picked nightly for whole-funnel coverage

decisions.decision: MVP shape: landing-page-only first; expand surface phase-by-phase
decisions.rationale: Avoid building wrong abstraction before knowing what good critique looks like
Prevents runaway loops; ~$30/mo at 3 personas nightly is acceptable

decisions.decision: tsx as TypeScript runner for scripts/
decisions.rationale: Modern, no ts-node config burden; aligns with Node 20+ engines field

next_action: User runs `npm run qa:icp` with real ANTHROPIC_API_KEY against running dev server. Review report at .planning/qa-reports/YYYY-MM-DD-landing.md. If report quality is good: expand harness surface (signup -> curriculum days 1/3/10/13 -> lab iframe -> exam Day 14) phase-by-phase. If report quality is weak: iterate on prompt shape before expanding surface.
context_notes: Track B MVP shipped. Files: app/scripts/qa/{personas.json, icp-funnel-sim.ts, README.md}, npm run qa:icp wired, playwright + @anthropic-ai/sdk + tsx installed, chromium browser downloaded (~92 MiB). Build green (14 routes unchanged). Typecheck green. Harness exits cleanly without ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (CI-safe). Cost expectation ~$0.30-$0.55 per 5-persona run; default cap $2 is ~3x headroom. Pricing source: claude-api skill (Jan 2026): Sonnet 4.6 = $3/$15 per 1M, Haiku 4.5 = $1/$5 per 1M, cache writes 1.25x input, cache reads ~0.1x. tsconfig.tsbuildinfo added to .gitignore.
